transcript.text: Hello, True Desires. I guess I'll go ahead and do my vlog for today. This is Living in Bolded Vlog, the 10th of December, 2013. It's 3.18 in the morning, as you can see, with my computer.

Um, I rented Superman. Man, I'm still leaving, though I saw it in the theaters with my mama. I wanted to get it again, because I like the special effects. Watch him fight. All those people and stuff go out fast. And then, see if I can get my roommate to watch it. I think he'd like it.

Um, I'm eating some chimichangas. I went to the supermarket and got some chimichangas. Got like an 8-pack for $3.28. Um, with my Tabasco. Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha. I filmed some, my animals do some cool things today. My hamster was sleeping all funny. You'll see at the end of the video. And then I filmed my, uh, gecko taking a dump.

Ha ha ha ha. Um, and I've only been feeding my geckos the waxworms. My crickets didn't come in today. Um, or I get, but I didn't, not like I expected them. I guess it's Tuesday. I don't expect them until like Thursday. They're not going to ship until like Tuesday or something today. Anyways, um, I was supposed to be at my mom's place at like 11, because I was going to help her organize stuff. Um, but I slept in. Like yesterday, I guess it was a good day, but today I wasn't as, I needed some extra sleep.

And I ended up showing up late at like two or something. She was a little bummed, but I didn't know I showed up at like one. So I did an hour, but I'm going to show up at three o'clock tomorrow. I don't really do that much. I just sit there in her office with her and like pick up paper and read it to her. So she knows what it is. And then she grabs it. And then I like put it, tells me to put it in places. And I don't know. It's just simple. She pays me 15 an hour though. And I get to eat food when I'm there too.

But, um, um, yeah. And then I came back here and I was riding on the bike and working on my ebook page, Kindle ebook page. And, um, and then I stopped because my back got kind of sore and I just burned out on it, you know, not physically, physically. I can do it as long as I want.

And I want to, you know, mentally get into it, do it more and more, but I'll do another video on how I do that. But, um, and then I was just working here on the couch, listening to my, uh, history of, uh, the world by Heinrich van Lund, complete history of the world. Or I can never remember the name of the book. Great book. That's why I just, I love it. Oh God, I'm gobbling it up. Greatest book ever.

Um, yeah. And so that's what I did today. Uh, um, um, you know, I'll go to sleep when I go to sleep. Like when I, when I work, I'll like this, you know, it makes, gives me insomnia. And, and I, I, you know, even if I did lie down, I wouldn't go to sleep. I'm too riled. So it's good to ease into sleep, like watch a movie or watch something else. Or I'll go back in the book, but eat, eat this stuff, you know, anyways, enjoy my animals doing wacky things. Peace out.
